title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Evok International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Evok International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Evok International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!
